3177820.name: Dungeon addictor
3177820.description:
"Dungeon Addictor" is a top-down, fixed-screen action game.

Players dive into dungeons in search of the legendary item, the "Hero's Crown," exploring procedurally generated dungeons while acquiring powerful weapons and armor along the way.

This game is likely not something you'll clear on your first try. The reason is that the game contains a significant mystery, and unless you solve it, the enemies will become too strong to progress further.

As you advance through the dungeon, new creatures will appear. The stages change through five levels, and only a true master will be able to see the final stage. Your challenge awaits...
developers: N2インタラクティヴジャパン株式会社
publishers: N2インタラクティヴジャパン株式会社
